title: justicia gutierrezii
intro: Justicia gutierrezii, also known as 'Tulsi of the Andes', is a plant species native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Justicia gutierrezii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
